title: ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer, one-on-one, and group support on topics such as recovery, relationships, stress, co-dependency, parenting, and grief. Also provides specialized information and referrals. 213 NE 10th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (971) 228-2020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 228-2020 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Codependents Support Groups General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Parent Support Groups Relapse Prevention Programs Stress Management Substance Use Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FACILITATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
